title: How Great Thou Art
verse1: O Lord my God, when I in awesome wonder
Consider all the worlds Thy hands have made
verse2: When through the woods and forest glades I wander
And hear the birds sing sweetly in the trees
verse3: And when I think that God, His Son not sparing
Sent Him to die, I scarce can take it in
verse4: When Christ shall come with shout of acclamation
And take me home, what joy shall fill my heart
chorus: Then sings my soul, my Saviour God, to Thee
How great Thou art, how great Thou art
